giftsubcurrencyrewards.usage: Usage: !giftcurrencyreward list | toggle | source [giftsub|bits] [EUR per unit] | set [currencyId] [EUR-to-currency formula] | remove [currencyId]
giftsubcurrencyrewards.list.none: No payment custom-currency formulas have been configured.
giftsubcurrencyrewards.source.set: $1 conversion rate set to $2 EUR per unit.
giftsubcurrencyrewards.set.usage: Usage: !giftcurrencyreward set [currencyId] [formula]. Formula supports x, numbers, +, -, *, /, and parentheses.
giftsubcurrencyrewards.remove.missing: No payment reward formula exists for '$1'.
